title: Seyfibaba Pazaryeri
summary: Turkiye odakli pazaryeri platformu. Laravel 10 backend, Next.js 15 frontend, Iyzico pazaryeri odeme entegrasyonu, AI urun icerigi olusturma ve OTP dogrulama.
description: CodeCanyon Shopo temasina dayali, Turkiye pazarina uyarlanmis cok-saticiyi e-ticaret pazaryeri. Sub-merchant destekli Iyzico odeme, Iletimerkezi/Netgsm SMS OTP, OpenAI/Claude/Groq ile AI urun icerik uretimi, admin ve satici panelleri.
features: AI-powered product content generation (OpenAI, Claude, Groq)
Admin panel with product, seller and order management
Seller panel with KYC, bulk import, stock alerts
designHighlights: Marketplace payment model with automatic commission split
